title: Fix admin panel product management functionality

requirements.summary: Fix useGetAllProducts hook to properly fetch and display products in admin Products Management table with error handling and loading states
acceptanceCriteria: useGetAllProducts hook successfully fetches products from backend
Products display correctly in ProductsManagement component table
Loading states and error messages are shown appropriately
Products list automatically refreshes after successful product creation

file_operations.description: Fix the useGetAllProducts React Query hook to properly call backend getAllProducts function with correct error handling. Ensure the query is properly configured with queryKey ['products'], retry logic, and refetchOnMount settings. Add console logging for debugging fetch errors with detailed error context.

Update ProductsManagement component to properly display loading states, error messages, and empty states when products fail to load. Ensure the component correctly uses the useGetAllProducts hook and handles all possible states (loading, error, empty, success). Add user-friendly error messages that guide troubleshooting.

requirements.summary: Fix useCreateProduct mutation hook to properly submit product data and invalidate query cache for automatic list refresh
acceptanceCriteria: useCreateProduct mutation successfully submits product data to backend createProduct function
Mutation handles success and error responses correctly
Query cache is invalidated after successful creation to refresh products list
Success/error feedback is displayed to user
Form resets only after successful product creation

file_operations.description: Fix the useCreateProduct mutation hook to properly submit complete Product objects to the backend createProduct function. Ensure all Product fields (id, name, category, price, discount, stockQuantity, description, images as ExternalBlob array) are correctly formatted. Add onSuccess callback that invalidates the 'products' query cache to trigger automatic refresh. Implement comprehensive error handling with detailed console logging for mutation failures, including network errors and validation errors. Add success/error toast notifications or callbacks for UI feedback.

requirements.summary: Fix ProductFormModal component to ensure form submission calls useCreateProduct with all required fields and handles loading/error states correctly
acceptanceCriteria: ProductFormModal correctly collects all form field values (name, category, price, discount, stock, description, images)
Form submission triggers useCreateProduct mutation with complete product data
Loading state ('Saving...') displays correctly during submission
Form only resets after receiving successful response from backend
Error messages display if submission fails

file_operations.description: Fix the ProductFormModal form submission handler to properly collect all form fields and construct a complete Product object with id (generate using crypto.randomUUID() or Date.now().toString()), name, category, price (as number), discount (as bigint), stockQuantity (as bigint), description, rating (default to 0), and images (as ExternalBlob array). Ensure the mutation's isLoading state correctly controls the 'Saving...' button text. Only reset the form after mutation.isSuccess is true, not immediately on submission. Display error messages from mutation.error in the UI. Add console logging for form data validation and submission process.

requirements.summary: Add comprehensive error logging to frontend useCreateProduct mutation to capture and display exact error messages
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend displays user-friendly error messages from backend responses
Console errors provide clear diagnostic information for debugging
Network request failures are caught and logged with status codes

file_operations.description: Add comprehensive error logging to useCreateProduct mutation's onError callback. Log the complete error object, error message, and mutation variables (product data being submitted). Capture and log network error details including status codes if available. Ensure error messages are user-friendly and actionable (e.g., 'Failed to create product. Please check all fields and try again.'). Add console.group to organize debug output clearly.

Add detailed console logging throughout the form submission process: log the raw form data collected, the constructed Product object before submission, and any validation errors. Log when the mutation starts, succeeds, or fails with timestamps. Display user-friendly error messages from the mutation in a visible error state within the modal (e.g., error alert or text below the form).

requirements.summary: Test the complete product management workflow end-to-end to verify demo products display, form submission works, and products persist
acceptanceCriteria: Demo products are visible in Products Management table on page load
Add Product form successfully submits and creates new product
New product appears in products table immediately without manual refresh
Products persist in backend storage and remain visible after page refresh
No console errors appear during the entire workflow

file_operations.description: Ensure useGetAllProducts is configured with staleTime: 0 and refetchOnMount: true to guarantee fresh data on every mount. Verify the query correctly triggers refetch after cache invalidation from useCreateProduct's onSuccess. Add console logging to track query refetch cycles and data updates for debugging the complete workflow.

Verify that ProductsManagement component correctly displays all products from useGetAllProducts including demo products. Ensure the table updates immediately when the query refetches after product creation. Add console logging to track when the products list updates and confirm new products appear. Test that the component handles empty state appropriately when no products exist.

Verify the complete form submission flow: form validation, Product object construction with all required fields (ensure images are ExternalBlob instances), mutation call, loading state display, success handling (form reset + modal close), and error handling. Add console logging at each step to verify the workflow. Ensure the 'Saving...' indicator appears during submission and the form only resets after successful backend confirmation.
